ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "rated" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the movie */,
  "released" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "plot" TEXT /* Plot summary of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID for the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer video */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or catchphrase of the movie */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* URL to the official movie website */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average user rating */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of user ratings */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification or rating in other regions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "imdb_rank" INTEGER /* IMDb rank of the movie */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDb rating of the movie */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the IMDb rating */,
  "metacritic_score" INTEGER /* Metacritic score of the movie */,
  "tomatometer" INTEGER /* Rotten Tomatoes score */,
  "audience_score" INTEGER /* Rotten Tomatoes audience score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre mapping */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Short biography of the director */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the director's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-director mapping */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Short biography of the actor */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the actor's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-actor mapping */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor in the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the production company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the company's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-production company mapping */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_companies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_companies_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-10) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review contains spoilers */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislikes_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., 'Admin', 'User') */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
